title: Increase Text widget colour options
excerpt:
Can we please add more colours to the colour wheel used for text colour / highlighting in the Text widget. 
I want to make a text header for a dashboard of stuck items - which by default are red, yet red isn’t even a sel…

posts.author: martinrval (Martin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can we please add more colours to the colour wheel used for text colour / highlighting in the Text widget.

I want to make a text header for a dashboard of stuck items - which by default are red, yet red isn’t even a selectable colour.
